title: MMI Daily Iron Ore Index Report September 19 2025
section_path: MMI Daily Iron Ore Index Report September 19 2025
section_path_text: MMI Daily Iron Ore Index Report September 19 2025
summary:
Main
in Chinese iron ore and steelmaking prices 19/09/2025
Iron ore futures held up well today, with the most-traded contract I2601 closing at 807.5, up 0.81% WoW. Traders showed astrong willingness to sell, while steel mills remained cau ous and observed the market, with purchase willingness declining from yesterday. Market transac on senment was moderate.
